---
title: "Project 4"
author: "Lu Bai"
date: "2026-05-04"
output: word_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
#remotes::install_github("pbreheny/hdrm")
library(hdrm)    # For data generation
library(glmnet)  # For Lasso and Elastic Net
library(MASS)    # For AIC/BIC/Backward selection
library(dplyr)
```

## Simulation Setup: Parameters

```{r}
# Simulation setup: define parameters
# For reproducibility
set.seed(2026) 
iterations <- 100
n_vals <- c(250, 500)
rho_vals <- c(0, 0.35, 0.7)
p_total <- 20
p_active <- 5
# Define the beta vector
true_beta <- c(0.5/3, 1/3, 1.5/3, 2/3, 2.5/3, rep(0, 15))
```

## Data generation wrapper
```{r}
# Data generation wrapper
generate_sim_data <- function(n_size, rho_val) {
  data_obs <- gen_data(
    n = n_size, 
    p = p_total,
    p1 = p_active,
    beta = true_beta, 
    family = "gaussian", # Linear regression
    corr = "exch", # Use exchangeable correlation structure
    rho = rho_val
  )
  return(data_obs)
}
```

## Wrapper to evaluate performance for each method
```{r}
# Wrapper to evaluate performance for each method
evaluate_method <- function(selected_indices, X, y, true_beta) {
  p <- p_total
  active_idx <- 1:p_active
  noise_idx <- (p_active+1):p_total
  
  # Selection accuracy metrics (TPR/FPR) 
  tpr <- mean(active_idx %in% selected_indices)
  fpr <- mean(noise_idx %in% selected_indices)
  
  # Setup results for bias and coverage 
  # Non-selected variables are treated as estimates of zero
  betas_hat <- rep(0, p)
  coverage <- rep(0, p)
  type_i_err <- rep(0, p)
  type_ii_err <- rep(0, p)
  
  # Refit selected model for inference
  if (length(selected_indices) > 0) {
    # Refit the final selected model 
    X_sub <- X[, selected_indices, drop = FALSE]
    refit_mod <- lm(y ~ X_sub)
    
    # Extract coefficients and CIs (excluding intercept)
    refit_coefs <- coef(refit_mod)[-1]
    refit_ci <- confint(refit_mod)[-1, , drop = FALSE]
    refit_pvals <- summary(refit_mod)$coefficients[-1, 4]
    
    betas_hat[selected_indices] <- refit_coefs
    
    # coverage and errors for selected variables 
    for (j in seq_along(selected_indices)) {
      idx <- selected_indices[j]
      # 95% CI Coverage
      if (true_beta[idx] >= refit_ci[j, 1] && true_beta[idx] <= refit_ci[j, 2]) {
        coverage[idx] <- 1
      }
      # Type I Error
      if (idx > 5 && refit_pvals[j] < 0.05) type_i_err[idx] <- 1
      # Type II Error
      if (idx <= 5 && refit_pvals[j] >= 0.05) type_ii_err[idx] <- 1
    }
  }
  # Non-selected variables: estimate=0, no interval 
  unselected_idx <- setdiff(1:p, selected_indices)
  for (idx in unselected_idx) {
    # Coverage is 0 if it should be selected but didn't
    coverage[idx] <- ifelse(true_beta[idx] == 0, 1, 0)
    # If not selected, we didn't reject H0; Type II error if true_beta != 0
    if (idx <= 5) type_ii_err[idx] <- 1
  }
  
  bias <- betas_hat - true_beta
  
  return(c(TPR = tpr, FPR = fpr, 
           Bias_Avg = mean(bias), 
           Coverage_Avg = mean(coverage),
           TypeI_Avg = mean(type_i_err[6:20]),
           TypeII_Avg = mean(type_ii_err[1:5])))
}
```

## Main simulation loop
```{r}
# Storage for results
all_results <- list() #data.frame()

# Simulation Loops
for (N in n_vals) {
  for (rho in rho_vals) {
    cat("Running Scenario: N =", N, ", Rho =", rho, "\n")
    scenario_results <- matrix(NA, nrow = iterations * 7, ncol = 8)
    colnames(scenario_results) <- c("Iter", "Method", "TPR", "FPR", "Bias", "Coverage", "TypeI", "TypeII")
    
    for (i in 1:iterations) {
      # Generate data 
      sim_data <- generate_sim_data(N, rho)
      X <- sim_data$X
      y <- sim_data$y
      data_df <- data.frame(y, X)
      
      # Method 1: Backward Selection p-value = 0.05
      full_mod <- lm(y ~ ., data = data_df)
      back_fit <- step(full_mod, direction = "backward", trace = 0, 
                       k = qchisq(0.05, 1, lower.tail = FALSE))
      
      # Method 2 & 3: AIC & BIC
      aic_mod <- step(full_mod, direction = "backward", trace = 0, k = 2)
      bic_mod <- step(full_mod, direction = "backward", trace = 0, k = log(N))
      
      # Method 4 & 5: Lasso & Elastic Net
      # Cross-validation for tuning parameters lambda.min and lambda.1se
      cv_lasso <- cv.glmnet(X, y, alpha = 1)
      cv_enet  <- cv.glmnet(X, y, alpha = 0.5)
      
      # Helper to get indices
      get_idx <- function(m) as.numeric(gsub("V", "", names(coef(m))[-1]))
      get_pen_idx <- function(cv, s) which(as.vector(coef(cv, s=s))[-1] != 0)
      
      # Extract coefficients and evaluation for all senarios
      methods_list <- list(
        "Backward p-value" = get_idx(back_fit),
        "Backward AIC" = get_idx(aic_mod),
        "Backward BIC" = get_idx(bic_mod),
        "Lasso_min" = get_pen_idx(cv_lasso, "lambda.min"),
        "Lasso_1se" = get_pen_idx(cv_lasso, "lambda.1se"),
        "ENet_min"  = get_pen_idx(cv_enet, "lambda.min"),
        "ENet_1se"  = get_pen_idx(cv_enet, "lambda.1se")
      )

      # Map results into temporary scenario matrix
      for (m_idx in seq_along(methods_list)) {
        res <- evaluate_method(methods_list[[m_idx]], X, y, true_beta)
        row_pos <- (i-1)*7 + m_idx
        scenario_results[row_pos, ] <- c(i, names(methods_list)[m_idx], res)
      }
    }
    # Store scenario aggregate
    all_results[[paste0("N", N, "_R", rho)]] <- as.data.frame(scenario_results)
  }
}
```
